name: python3-jeepney
title: python3-jeepney
description:
pure Python D-Bus interface
Jeepney is a pure Python implementation of D-Bus messaging. It has an
I/O-free core, and integration modules for different event loops.
.
D-Bus is an inter-process communication system, mainly used in Linux.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jeepney because pure Python D-Bus interface.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jeepney as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jeepney with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jeepney --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
